params.name: Auto-Reserve Videos
params.desc: Stores video data to prevent reloading

params.name: Play Button
params.desc: Setup button to play video when paused

params.name: Pause Button
params.desc: Setup button to pause video when playing

params.name: Repeat Button
params.desc: Setup button to play video from start

params.name: Max Frames
params.desc: Number of frames the graphic uses

params.name: Keyboard Trigger Key
params.desc: Keyboard key used to trigger button

params.name: Cold Graphic
params.desc: Graphic for button when not mouse over.

params.name: Hot Graphic
params.desc: Graphic for button when mouse over.
